data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Currency-aware checkout handling', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While there are successful booking records that indicate currency usage (e.g., 'currency': 'USD'), there is no explicit evidence demonstrating that the system handles currency variations or conversions appropriately. This indicates a gap in the coverage of the requirement, as the evidence does not provide a comprehensive validation of the currency-aware functionality.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of 'Currency-aware checkout handling'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for currency handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify currency handling in checkout.
